reference_body.pose: Forge display A-pose for review; runtime attaches to VRM humanoid bones.

preview_contract.authoring_target: GLB/glTF hard-surface armor fitted to VRM body

coordinate_system.scale_rule: apply transforms before GLB export; runtime may uniformly scale by wearer height

target_envelope.authoring_target_basis: Forge reference VRM metrics at 170cm; use as first-pass external model envelope

uv_requirements.texel_density: consistent inside mirror pair and adjacent seam pair

modeler_notes: Preserve the body-conforming base suit as the inner layer; this part sits above it.
Leave enough negative space for the VRM body surface and animation deformation.
Keep the readable tokusatsu silhouette bright and non-hostile.
Keep visor and helmet shell as separable material zones for later emissive mask work.

target_envelope.authoring_target_basis: Forge reference VRM metrics at 170cm; use as first-pass external model envelope

uv_requirements.texel_density: consistent inside mirror pair and adjacent seam pair

modeler_notes: Preserve the body-conforming base suit as the inner layer; this part sits above it.
Leave enough negative space for the VRM body surface and animation deformation.
Keep the readable tokusatsu silhouette bright and non-hostile.
Treat torso pieces as a connected shell set; seams must read cleanly from front and mirror views.
